title: Usopp’s Village Comes Into View
description: On pages 1–4, the Syrup Village story develops through Usopp, Kaya, Kuro, Jango, and the Straw Hats as the danger behind the village’s peaceful surface becomes clearer.
scene: This scene follows the tension around Usopp’s village: lies, loyalty, hidden plans, and the growing clash with the Black Cat Pirates.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: We need to plan things more!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What do you mean?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Are we going to the "grand line" like THIS?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Oh, that's right! Although Uncle Cabbage gave us plenty of fruits,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We don't have any meat on this ship!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: I am not talking about the food sub- plies!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: And we don't have any sake to drink either! How boring!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Let's not worry about the problem of food and drink first!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: The place we're going, the "grand line" is the most Dan- Geros place in the world!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: every pirate in this world wishes to get the treasure there,

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: So we need to get a better ship first!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We're also short on crew members and this ship doesn't have any equipment

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: No matter what you think, we can't possi-bly be safe!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Oh! What do we do then?

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: We have to prepare first, and plan for the journeys ahead

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: There's a village due north. We, should go there first!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: First thing to do when we get there is look for a better ship!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: And eat some meat!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: HU HU! It's such a beautiful- full day...

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: Kan: I

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: There's nothing like starting such a happy and refresh- ing day by looking at the sea!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: village youngster USOPPP

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: chirp!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: CHARP CHARP!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: This is bad!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: We're in danger!!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The Pirates are attack- ing!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The Pirates are coming! The pirates are coming!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The Pirates are coming!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The Pirates are coming!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: EVERY- body, run!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: What!? Pirates!!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: The Pirates are coming!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: OH! USOPPP is starting to shout again, that means I have to go to work now

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: This is bad! This is bad...

summary: The part advances the Syrup Village arc by tying Usopp’s reputation and Kaya’s safety to the threat posed by Kuro and his crew.
